query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS affected_count
FROM products p
JOIN station_tasks b ON b.productId = p.id AND b.stationCode = 'B' AND b.stationTaskStatus = 'completed'
JOIN station_tasks c ON c.productId = p.id AND c.stationCode = 'C' AND c.stationTaskStatus = 'pending'
WHERE p.archivedAt IS NULL
  AND JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(b.metadata, '$.faultOptionIds')) > 0
  AND COALESCE(JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(c.metadata, '$.bFaultOptionIds')), 0) = 0
  AND COALESCE(JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(c.metadata, '$.bFaultLabels')), 0) = 0;

FROM products p
JOIN station_tasks b ON b.productId = p.id AND b.stationCode = 'B' AND b.stationTaskStatus = 'completed'
JOIN station_tasks c ON c.productId = p.id AND c.stationCode = 'C' AND c.stationTaskStatus = 'pending'
WHERE p.archivedAt IS NULL
  AND JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(b.metadata, '$.faultOptionIds')) > 0
  AND COALESCE(JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(c.metadata, '$.bFaultOptionIds')), 0) = 0
  AND COALESCE(JSON_LENGTH(JSON_EXTRACT(c.metadata, '$.bFaultLabels')), 0) = 0;
